Author: OOFGames
Name: Chocobo Racing Gamba
Description: Players pick a chocobo(s) to bet on, the host rolls /random to advance chocobos, and the first to reach the finish line wins. Type /crg or /Chocoboracinggamba to open the main window.
Punchline: Host Chocobo Racing Gamba with your friends in Eorzea!
Changelog:
- Temporarily disabled player view. Will create a backend for it.
- Fixed bug where voiding a race with pending bets would add the pending bet to users balance.

Author: OOFGames
Name: Gamba Where
Description: Browse active gambling events across Eorzea or host your own session. Use /gambawhere to open the interface.
Punchline: Find and host FFXIV gambling events near you.
Changelog:
- Added new auto end feature to the host gamba tab.
- Pill will display time left on session if new auto end is enabled.
- See announcements for screenshots.

Author: OOFGames
Name: Mini Games Emporium
Description: A plugin to manage mini game sessions, player queues, and Gil transactions. Use /minigames to open the main window.
Punchline: Host BAR 777 and other mini games with automated queue management.
Changelog:
- Session and transaction history now stored in a LiteDB database for persistence and improved performance.
- Removed 30 day transaction reset.
- Added max 100 sessions/transactions per page.
- You can now click a player on the deathroll tournament bracket and swap them for someone else nearby.
- You can add players manually now but need to link them to a real player upon tournament start.
- Added new games tabs.
- Updated winner UI for both BAR 777 and Deathroll.
- Changed queue number from 0 to next on auto queue tells.
